zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth d'Aumarle於大約1345年出生在英國戴文書特時，她的父親William d'Aumarle26歲，母親Agnes Helen de Meriet19歲。她和John VII Maltravers至少有2個女兒。她去世於1413年10月15日享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿波次波利。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth d'Aumarle was born about 1345, in Shute, Devon, England, her father, William d'Aumarle, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Helen de Meriet, was 19. She had at least 2 daughters with John VII Maltravers. She died on 15 October 1413, at the age of 69, and was buried in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth d'Aumarle est née environ 1345, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aumarle, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Helen de Meriet, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec John VII Maltravers. Elle est décédée le 15 octobre 1413, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth d'Aumarle um 1345 in Shute, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Aumarle 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Helen de Meriet 19. Sie hatte mit John VII Maltravers mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Oktober 1413 im Alter von 69 Jahren und wurde in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth d'Aumarleが約1345年にイギリスデボンシュトで生まれた時，父William d'Aumarleは26歳，母Agnes Helen de Merietは19歳であった。彼女はJohn VII Maltraversとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1413年10月15日に69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトアボトスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth d'Aumarle(이)가 대략 1345년 영국 데폰 슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Aumarle(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Helen de Meriet(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 John VII Maltravers(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1413년 10월 15일 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 애벗스버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth d'Aumarle родилась около 1345 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Aumarle было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Helen de Meriet, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от John VII Maltravers. Она умерла 15 октября 1413 г. в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
